description: This Kotlin source file defines the MainViewModel class, which manages UI-related data and interactions for an Android application. It handles authentication states, manages network calls, and processes user actions such as login, lock, unlock, call protected endpoints, and logout. It also maintains a status log for UI updates.

classes.name: MainViewModel
classes.description: ViewModel managing authentication state, user actions, network calls, and UI status log for the app.

methods.name: login
methods.description: Performs login via mock API, manages session tokens, and updates UI log.

methods.name: lock
methods.description: Locks the current session, requiring re-authentication to unlock.

methods.name: unlock
methods.description: Unlocks the session after biometric verification.

methods.name: callProtected
methods.description: Calls the protected resource API endpoint and logs the response.

methods.name: logout
methods.description: Clears tokens and sets authentication state to logged out.

methods.name: clearLog
methods.description: Clears the status log displayed in the UI.

methods.name: appendLog
methods.description: Appends a message to the status log with a timestamp.
